I'm going to do a list of some errors, big or small, that rovio should fix in a future update for the ab classic remake:
1: why is the app icon off-center? https://t.co/KHQED67PVy

2: the bird's sound are a bit off sometimes.
3: frame drops when the bird gets launched.
4:big loading times sometimes, when the original had little to none 
(3 and 4 might be from some bad optimization for my phone, since it played well on other phones.) https://t.co/LWDco9ldID

Weird graphical oddity with the remaster is that because of the blue background on the bird tutorials, that might’ve messed up bombs sprite on the top, it got blue instead of yellow on here, almost similar to his short fuse ability. Though im sure they’ll fix it in a update https://t.co/wlr7OMyaPr

After a year of building, I finished King Pig’s castle on Minecraft! (Apart of some rooms.)
#angrybirds https://t.co/DMWb15ZajZ
It took a long time to build because the building is large and I used the IOS platform of Minecraft. Not to mention that sometimes I didn’t feel like building it. https://t.co/b3Pl4NX7Ag

Here I went upstairs to see the hallway of rooms and up again to see the kitchen and the bathroom. (Btw, when I got to the end of the hall, I used scaffoldings because there wasn’t enough space to build the stairs.) https://t.co/NfapyCHqTz
I show the art gallery, the storage, and the tower on top of the castle. I also looked around the castle too. https://t.co/jWVXpFAJZm
